backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the logo image integration feature, listing affected files (Header, login pages) and associated test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, covering styling, components, pages, and utility modules for the Luid support platform.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Luid Central De Atendimento' with Brazilian Portuguese locale and a root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with six routes (client, master, staff login/panel), wraps everything in AuthProvider, and initializes the localStorage database.
frontend/src/components/AddClientForm.ts: Form component for master admins to create new clients with LUID ID, optional client name, and password fields, with validation and success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/AllChatView.tsx: Staff/admin chat view that groups all chat messages by LUID ID into expandable accordion threads with inline reply functionality.
frontend/src/components/AllTicketsView.t: Displays all support tickets in an expandable list for staff/admin, allowing replies and toggling ticket open/resolved status.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Live chat UI component for a client identified by luidId, polling messages every 3 seconds and showing an offline state when chat is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/ClientProfile.ts: Modal dialog that displays a client's profile information (name, LUID ID, creation date, support tier) with styled tier badges.
frontend/src/components/ClientsTable.tsx: Admin table for managing clients with inline name editing, tier selection, password reset modal, and client deletion.
frontend/src/components/CreateTicket.tsx: Form component that allows a client to create a new support ticket by submitting a subject and message.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header showing the LuidCorporation logo, current user role badge, profile button for clients, and a logout action.
frontend/src/components/NotificationToas: A fixed-position toast notification component that animates in/out when a message is provided, displaying a bell icon, label, message text, and a dismiss button.
frontend/src/components/StaffChatView.ts: A thin wrapper component that renders AllChatView for the staff chat interface.
frontend/src/components/TicketDetail.tsx: Displays a support ticket's messages with reply input and open/resolved status toggle, using localStorage-backed db helpers for updates.
frontend/src/components/TicketList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of tickets for a given luidId, showing subject, message count, and open/resolved status with selection highlighting.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication state via React context, persisting the logged-in user to localStorage or sessionStorage depending on the stayLoggedIn flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication hook and provider using @dfinity/auth-client, exposing login/clear functions and status flags via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Polls localStorage-backed ticket and chat data on an interval to detect new activity, updating badge counts and triggering toast messages for relevant role-based changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: An intentionally empty module noting that all data operations use localStorage via lib/db.ts rather than backend canister queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports JetBrains Mono/Inter fonts, sets up Tailwind, defines dark-theme CSS custom properties using oklch colors, and provides reusable utility classes like glass-panel, neon-border, neon-btn, and status indicators.
frontend/src/lib/db.ts: localStorage-backed data layer providing CRUD operations for clients, staff, admins, tickets, and chat messages, along with simple password hashing and validation utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ClientLogin.tsx: Client login page that authenticates users by LUID ID and password against localStorage, then redirects to the client portal on success.
frontend/src/pages/ClientPortal.tsx: Main client dashboard page with tabs for tickets and chat, a create-ticket button, and notification toast integration, redirecting unauthenticated users to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/MasterLogin.tsx: Admin master login page that validates credentials via validateAdminLogin and redirects to the master panel on success, styled with an amber/gold neon theme.
frontend/src/pages/MasterPanel.tsx: Master admin panel page with sections for adding/managing clients, viewing all tickets and chat, and managing staff members (create, delete, edit credentials). Also includes a chat online/offline toggle and notification toasts.
frontend/src/pages/StaffLogin.tsx: Login page for staff members at /staff, validating credentials against the internal DB and redirecting to the staff panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/StaffPanel.tsx: Staff panel page with tabs for tickets and chat management, a chat online/offline toggle, a refresh button, and notification toasts for new activity.
frontend/src/types/db.ts: TypeScript type definitions for all internal database entities: Client, Staff, Admin, Message, Ticket, ChatMessage, AuthUser, and related enums/unions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with neon green colors, OKLCH-based surface/semantic tokens, custom monospace fonts, neon glow box shadows, and keyframe animations for the app's dark neon aesthetic.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing LuidCentral's architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions including localStorage-based persistence, hardcoded admin credentials, and neon green UI aesthetic.
